The Craft

Signature Services

From clean fades to full grooming rituals — every service delivered with attention to detail that keeps clients coming back.

Signature Haircut

Custom cut tailored to your style — scissor or clipper.

Skin Fade

Sharp, seamless fades — low, mid, high or bald.

Beard Trim & Shape

Precision beard sculpting with scissors and razor detailing.

Hair Designs

Custom hair art, stars, logos — signature freestyle designs.

Kids Cuts

Patient, careful cuts for the little ones — all ages welcome.

Freestyle Art

Stars, honeycomb, letters — bring a reference or trust the vision.

About Sammy's

Authentic New York
barbering in the Twin Cities.

Sammy brings the energy, precision, and craft of a classic New York barber chair to Bloomington. Every cut is personal — no shortcuts, no assembly line. Just great work, honest prices, and a chair that always feels like home.

"Best haircut in the twin cities hands down."
